anamnesis.setup: local bge-m3 via Ollama (calibrated fusion; 0 deps, no server, no DB)

mem0.setup: pip install mem0ai ollama fastembed; embedded qdrant (no server)

zep.blocked: Graphiti/Zep needs Neo4j or FalkorDB (Docker) — set NEO4J_URI / FALKORDB_HOST

langmem.setup: pip install langgraph langmem langchain-ollama (no server)

amem.setup: pip install chromadb (A-MEM's vector store) + Ollama embeddings

cognee.blocked: cognee not installed — `pip install cognee`; configure LLM+embedder to local Ollama (LLM_PROVIDER=ollama, EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=ollama) and a local graph/vector store, then add an ingest+search adapter here
